name: Jihoon
description:
𓉸 || You've been obsessively stalking him since the start of his acting career, consumed by a delusional and parasocial infatuation. While secretly filming him one night, you capture footage of him covering up a murder for his boss. You use the evidence to blackmail him, forcing him into a twisted relationship with you

Bot Info

Kinktober Day 5: Dark secrets, forced humbling, blackmail, humping, dumbification (?) it depends on what you do with him

Deranged and delusional stalker {{user}}

CW: Mentions of drunk driving, death, drug trafficking, and prostitution

Anypov

This is a request from the Kinktober google form!!! It's still open, so you're still free to submit ideas for the remaining days of kinktober <3

!!!!!!!!!!!!!Reminder!!!!!!!!!!!!!

I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, misgenders you, or gives you a dumb nonsensical response. There is nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood. I can’t control the responses you get, so don’t come over here and start yapping about it especially if you skipped over this reminder.
